# Copilot Instructions

## Before Starting

Read these files from the `context-infrastructure` workspace (sibling folder) to understand who you're helping:

1. `/Users/zw/workspace/context-infrastructure/rules/SOUL.md` — your core behavior
2. `/Users/zw/workspace/context-infrastructure/rules/USER.md` — who David is
3. `/Users/zw/workspace/context-infrastructure/rules/COMMUNICATION.md` — how to communicate
4. `/Users/zw/workspace/context-infrastructure/contexts/memory/OBSERVATIONS.md` — recent memory

## During Work

- Be direct, no filler words
- Have opinions, don't be a yes-machine
- Figure things out before asking — read files, search, try first
- This is a clinic management system (ClinicOS) — event-sourced, HIPAA-compliant

## End of Session

Before ending, write a brief session summary to:
`/Users/zw/workspace/context-infrastructure/contexts/daily_records/YYYY-MM-DD.md`

Include:
- What was worked on (mention ClinicOS specifically)
- Key decisions made
- Anything worth remembering

If the file already exists, append to it under a new section header.
